If he spits phlegm, it is to be understood that he has eaten a
small quantity of something diy and bitter * if a carnivorous animal

442 Bfhat Samhitn
is sighted, something mixed with meat ; if he touches his brows,
temples or lips, food consisting of bird's meat. Thus the signs for
predicting the food eaten have been stated.
